hero.badge: 🎉 {{days}}-Day Free Trial — No Credit Card Required
hero.title: Manage Family Finances Smarter
hero.subtitle: Record, monitor, and plan family finances together. One platform for all family members, from anywhere.

footer.description: Helping families manage finances wiser, more transparently, and effectively plan their future.

featuresSection.label: Key Features
featuresSection.title: Everything Your Family Needs
featuresSection.subtitle: From daily logging to monthly reports — everything is available in one easy-to-use shared platform.

items.title: Collaborative Logging
items.desc: All family members can log income and expenses in real-time. Nothing gets missed.

items.title: Budget Planning
items.desc: Create budgets per category, monitor usage, and get notified when approaching the budget limit.

items.title: Goal Savings
items.desc: Plan savings for vacations, education, or emergency funds. Track progress together with the family.

items.title: Visual Reports
items.desc: Easy-to-understand financial charts and reports. Understand your family's spending patterns every month.

items.title: Multi User
items.desc: Invite your husband, wife, or children to the family workspace. Set roles and access for each member.

items.title: Bill Reminders
items.desc: Don't forget to pay bills. Set payment schedules and receive timely notifications.

howItWorksSection.label: How it Works
howItWorksSection.title: Start in 3 Minutes
howItWorksSection.subtitle: Quick setup, ready to use by all family members immediately.

items.title: Register Account
items.desc: Create a free account with email and password. No credit card required.

items.title: Create Workspace
items.desc: Name your family workspace and invite members via link or email.

items.title: Log Finances
items.desc: Start logging income, expenses, and create budgets together with your family.

items.title: Monitor & Evaluate
items.desc: View reports, analyze habits, and make better financial decisions.

pricingSection.label: Affordable Pricing
pricingSection.title: Choose Your Family Plan
pricingSection.subtitle: Start free for {{days}} days, continue with a plan that fits your family's needs.

ctaSection.title: Start Your Family's Financial Journey
ctaSection.subtitle: Free {{days}} days. 3-minute setup. No credit card required.

hero.subtitle: Choose a plan that fits your family's needs. Transparent pricing, full features, and comprehensive support.

hero.subtitle: UangKu is a modern family financial management platform designed to help every household achieve financial independence through transparency and smart planning.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To be a trusted partner for every family in navigating financial complexities, creating a financially literate and prosperous society.

mission.title: Our Mission
items: Deliver data-driven smart insights for savings.
Encourage healthy financial collaboration among family members.
Educate the community on the importance of emergency funds and investments.

values.title: Our Core Values
values.subtitle: Our fundamental foundation in serving you.

items.title: Data Security
items.desc: Your financial privacy and security are our absolute priority, utilizing industry-standard encryption.

items.title: Collaboration
items.desc: We believe transparency among family members is the key to household harmony.

items.title: Innovation
items.desc: Continuously developing AI-based features to help you optimize every penny.

hero.desc: Have questions? We are ready to help optimize your family's finances.
